title: Australia Just Had Its 3rd Fatal Shark Attack in 4 Weeks
script: Western Australia just recorded its 3rd fatal shark attack in less than 4 weeks. A 35-year-old spearfisher was killed Saturday near Albany after a suspected 15-foot white shark attacked him while he dove with family. He was rushed to shore but could not be revived. Australia averages 3 shark deaths per year — all 3 have now happened before July. Local fishermen say shark activity near the coast is unusually high.
